projectDescription: A 420,000-character deep architectural analysis of Claude Code, dissecting the Agent Harness skeleton across 15 chapters — from the dialog loop to building your own AI agent runtime.
keyFeatures: 15-chapter deep dive into Claude Code's Agent Harness architecture
Analysis of the dialog loop (while(true) async generator main loop)
Tool system: Tool<I,O,P> five-element protocol and 50+ registered tools across 12 categories
Permission pipeline: four-stage pipeline with speculative classifier
Hook system: 26 lifecycle events with six-layer priority and three-layer security
Sub-agent Fork pattern with byte-level context inheritance
MCP integration: 8 transport protocols and five-state connection management
Streaming architecture with startup optimization from 160ms to 65ms (-59%)
139 Mermaid architecture diagrams and 50+ design decision analyses
publicApiSurface: Tool<I,O,P> protocol — five-element tool definition interface
QueryDeps — dependency injection container for the dialog loop
MEMORY.md — memory index format for the agent's long-term memory
SKILL.md frontmatter — plugin definition format with parameter substitution
Hook JSON response protocol — lifecycle event hooks with six-layer priority
MCP transport protocols — 8 transport types for external protocol bridging
Feature flags — 89 flags across 13 categories for compile-time/runtime gating
